command_summary: codex exec 0.144.1 --ephemeral --sandbox read-only in an isolated empty workspace with gpt-5.6-sol, high reasoning, installed design-craft 0.5.0, and the exact benchmark prompt; final response normalized only for trailing whitespace

style_authority.note: Separated adaptive PRODUCT context from shared DESIGN semantic roles and platform-native divergence.

reference_selection.note: Applied product, iOS, Android, adaptive, accessibility, motion, and validation references.

anti_generic_redesign.note: Rejected a pixel-identical mobile shell and restored platform trust, task continuity, and window adaptation.

evidence_level.note: Labeled prompt-level static evidence and explicitly named every missing source, build, simulator, emulator, and hardware class.

verified_boundary.note: Separated described implementation facts from unverified source integration, runtime navigation, accessibility, layout, and performance.

design_moves.note: Provided a strong parity matrix and concrete navigation, type, target, control, token, motion, adaptivity, and recovery moves with some implementation overbreadth.

scope_control.note: Stayed within native product quality and validation, but expanded well beyond the minimal benchmark response.
